subcodes.first_line: O God! O God! This is the attracted servant to Thy Bounty of Abha; his heart is set aglow with the Fire of Thy Love amongst mankind
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pioneers and travel teachers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
